name: existing-lender-mortgage-statement-wins
rationale: Broker email omits existing_mortgage_lender. loan_application doc shows 'Scotia' (broker-shorthand). mortgage_statement doc shows 'Scotiabank' (formal name). F1.EL canonical-map prefers mortgage_statement source per R11-B-2 (lender field is authoritative on mortgage_statement). Tests doc-source-hierarchy for lender field analogous to A32 for balance field.
notes: Single-event sequence. Sibling to A32 — both anchor on R11-B-2 filterCanonicalLenderForPayoutOnly; A32 = balance axis, A35 = lender axis.
